name: send_document_for_signature
description: Send one PDF to one email recipient for simple electronic signature. The service emails the signer, tracks completion, and returns the completed signed PDF. Payment: x402 (USDC on Base) per call. The response contains a one-time accessToken (Bearer) and a statusUrl; poll the statusUrl until status is 'completed', then GET statusUrl + '/document' to download the signed PDF. Simple electronic signatures (SES) only — no QES/AES, no identity verification, no legal advice.

documentName.description: Human-readable document title shown to the signer

documentUrl.description: HTTPS URL of the PDF to sign (max 5 MB). Provide either documentUrl OR documentBase64.

documentBase64.description: Base64-encoded PDF (max 5 MB decoded). Provide either documentUrl OR documentBase64.

message.description: Optional message included in the signature request email

expiresInDays.description: Days until the signature request expires

externalReference.description: Optional caller-side reference id, echoed back in responses
